name: Collection O Banda Aceh near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman formerly Hotel Mulana

reviews.reviewTitle: Great Value Stay at Collection O Banda Aceh (Formerly Hotel Mulana)
reviews.reviewComments:
​I recently stayed at this hotel, which was formerly known as Hotel Mulana, and I am honestly very happy with the overall experience. It is located in a great spot near the Baiturrahman Grand Mosque, which makes exploring the heart of Banda Aceh so much easier.
​The room and the bathroom were both spotlessly clean when I arrived. I really appreciated that because it shows they care about hygiene. The bed was very comfortable and the AC was nice and cold, so I could relax properly after a busy day.
​The staff were also professional and friendly. They made me feel welcome from the moment I checked in. What impressed me the most is that all the facilities are exactly what you would expect for the price. It is very rare to find a place where everything is so well-aligned with the cost, and for me, it offered excellent value for money.
​I also noticed how convenient the location is for finding local food and getting around the city. The atmosphere is calm enough for a good rest, yet you are still close to all the main attractions. It is definitely a reliable and practical place to stay.
​Overall, I am very satisfied with my choice. If you are visiting Banda Aceh and want a clean, comfortable, and affordable place with a great team, I highly recommend staying here.

reviews.originalComment: OYO ternyaman di banda Aceh.. bersih, dan akses ke pusat kota pun dekat.. rekomendasi pokok nya.. parkiran pun luas, anak saya nyaman selama menginap di sini.. yg terpnting sanitari nya bersih....
reviews.reviewComments: OYO is comfortable in Banda Aceh.. clean, and close access to the city center.. highly recommended.. the parking is also spacious, my child felt comfortable during the stay here.. the most important thing is that the sanitation is clean....

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih dan wangi, ac juga dingin. Security standby. Pada saat mati lampu, dipenginapan ttp hidup lampu dng genset.
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean and fragrant, the air conditioning is also cool. Security is on standby. During a power outage, the lights in the accommodation remain on with a generator.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel murah fasilitas lengkap. Tempat tidur nyaman,, AC dingin,, ada lemari kecil untuk nyimpan pakaian,, televisi,, ada air panas untuk mandi,, dan yang paling utama kamar mandi bersih..
reviews.reviewComments: Cheap hotel with complete facilities. Comfortable bed, cold air conditioning, a small wardrobe for storing clothes, television, hot water for showering, and most importantly, a clean bathroom.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih sampai ke handuk semua bersih & tidak bau, ada penanda arah kiblat, tv air hangat ac dispenser semua berfungsi dgn baik, akan jadi langganan setiap saya ke banda aceh
reviews.reviewComments: The room was clean with all towels clean and odor-free, there was a qibla direction marker, TV, hot water, air conditioning, and dispenser all functioning well; I will become a regular customer every time I go to Banda Aceh.

reviews.reviewComments: The bed is a bit hard in my room, but the facilities and service at that price are okay, I'm not disappointed.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan recommended untuk kebersihan dan lokasinya. Ke depan tetap disini saja untuk boking penginapannya
reviews.reviewComments: Recommended accommodation for its cleanliness and location. In the future, I will continue to book this accommodation.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel Maulana adalah penginapan yang hemat dan sangat strategis yang ada di Banda Aceh, jika anda ingin menikmati malam sambil ngopi dan dengerin live musik, Hotel Maulana adalah pilihan paling Jos 👍
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel Maulana is an economical and very strategic accommodation located in Banda Aceh. If you want to enjoy the night while sipping coffee and listening to live music, Hotel Maulana is the best choice. 👍

reviews.originalComment: Alhamdulillah dapat kamar nyaman, bersih, kamar mandi juga bersih dan ada air panas nya, rekomendasi utk hotel nya, saran saya kalo kalian dapat staf yg gak ramah, marahi aja, lagian kita bayar nginap distu gak numpang 😁
reviews.reviewComments: Thank God we got a comfortable room, clean, the bathroom is also clean and has hot water, I recommend the hotel, my advice is if you encounter unfriendly staff, just scold them, after all, we are paying to stay there, not just visiting 😁

reviews.originalComment: hotelnya bagus, bersih semua fasilitas perlengakapan bersih dan wangi, hanya saja terlalu ketat dgn tamu jd agak risih jg y krn terlalu diperhatikan keluar msk tamunya.namun keramahan sangat kurang menurut saya.dan bagi pasangan hrs bw surat nikah kl g tdk boleh msk y jd ni hotel emang syariah banget.cocok buat yg bnyk keluarga krn ada lobi dan pantrynya jd bs pk peralatan makn dan minumnya.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is nice, all the facilities and equipment are clean and smell good, but they are too strict with guests so it feels a bit uncomfortable because they pay too much attention to guests coming in and out. However, I think the hospitality is very lacking. Also, couples have to bring a marriage certificate; otherwise, they are not allowed to enter, so this hotel is very much in line with Sharia principles. It is suitable for families since there is a lobby and pantry, so you can use the utensils for eating and drinking.

reviews.originalComment: Kemana mana deket, deket sama rex, indomaret, ad jual jus samping penginapan, pokoknya recomend deh, nanti pas ke banda lg mau nginap disini lg, harga pun terjangkau 😁
reviews.reviewComments: Everything is close by, close to Rex, Indomaret, there's a juice stall next to the inn, I definitely recommend it. Next time I come to Banda, I want to stay here again, and the prices are affordable 😁

reviews.originalComment: Kamar sangat bersih dan harum. Sprei, selimut, handuk jg sangat bersih. Tdk disediakan air minum dlm kamar, namun di luar kamar disediakan air dan peralatan makan. Di sekitar hotel byk cafe dan penjual makanan. Di depan hotel jg ada swalayan. Kebijakan hotel ketat, tp krn kebijakan yg ketat itu maka setiap tamu bs dapat kamar dan jaminan pelayanan yg sangat baik.
reviews.reviewComments: The room is very clean and fragrant. The sheets, blankets, and towels are also very clean. No drinking water is provided in the room, but water and eating utensils are available outside the room. There are many cafes and food vendors around the hotel. There is also a supermarket in front of the hotel. The hotel's policy is strict, but because of that strict policy, every guest can have a room and guaranteed excellent service.

reviews.originalComment: Tolong lengkapi fasilitas di gedung baru, tangganya ada pegangannya biar semua pengunjung bisa safety
reviews.reviewComments: Please complete the facilities in the new building, the stairs should have handrails so that all visitors can be safe.

reviews.reviewTitle: Cheap in the middle of the City
reviews.originalComment: Letak lokasi dekat dengan pusat kuliner dan dekat dengak Pasar di Kota Banda Aceh, Harga sesuai dengan layanan, saya merekomendasikan HoTel ini untuk yang berkunjung ke kota Banda Aceh untuk Budgetted Traveller
reviews.reviewComments: The location is close to the culinary center and near the market in Banda Aceh City. The price is in line with the services; I recommend this hotel for those visiting Banda Aceh for budget travelers.
Staff friendly, property clean. My bus got in very early and the staff let me chill in the lobby until the sun came up and then looked after my bag until check-in. No complaints!
This hotel is value for money. The location is convenient and easy to walkability to nearby attractions. Very clean rooms. Parking is limited.

ituk kebersihan sih oke dan cukup nyaman, letak strategis di pusat kota mau kmna pun dekat, d sekitar jga bnyak y jualan makan. 
klu minus nya aku kurang suka krn ad wangi wangi dupa gtu, ntah krn d sebelah ad tempat sembahyang orang cina , dan satu lgi klu bawa bayi atau anak anak kudu ekstra jgn smp pas cekout ntar d bilang anak nya ompol, pdhal krn tumpahan air.

reviews.originalComment:
Karena dapat kamar di bagian belakang gedung dekat parkiran mobil
Kurang merasa nyaman 
Untuk kebersihan cukup bersih
Fasilitas sesuai harga
Lokasi oke dekat ke pusat kota
reviews.reviewComments: Because I got a room at the back of the building near the parking lot, I feel a bit uncomfortable. The cleanliness is quite good. The facilities match the price. The location is okay, close to the city center.

The owners were not friendly.
Cleanliness of hotel lobby and compund were terrible.
Kitchen area was messy & ugly.
Female staff were fairly helpful, but a BIG NO for male staff & the family of hotel owners.

reviews.originalComment: sy mau early check in krn sy smp di banda jam 6 pagi. Sy blg sm staf sy bayar jg gpp. Tp sm staf malam tdk ada dng alasan kmr penuh. Jam 12 sy balik lg k hotel utk check in namun oleh staf pagi dibilang jam 2 br bs check in kalau mau check in silahkan bayar 100 rb. Sy bingung knp td pagi sy mau bayar utk early check in tdk dikasih kok skr ud jam 12 siang baru bayar? Staf OB jg krg ramah sy mnt ganti handuk ktnya handuk boleh diganti 3 hr sekali. baru x ini sy dpt layanan hotel sangat tdk baik. mgkn bs jadi perbaikan utk manajemen hotel utk kedepan bs lebih baik lagi.
reviews.reviewComments: I want to check in early because I arrive in Banda at 6 in the morning. I told the staff I was willing to pay as well. But the night staff said no due to the room being full. At 12, I went back to the hotel to check in, but the morning staff said I could only check in at 2 and if I wanted to check in earlier, I had to pay 100,000 IDR. I'm confused because in the morning I was willing to pay for early check in but was not allowed, and now at 12 noon I have to pay? The housekeeping staff was also not very friendly; when I asked for new towels, they said towels could only be changed every 3 days. This is the first time I have received such poor hotel service. Maybe this could be a point of improvement for the hotel management to do better in the future.
berdekatan indo maret & kupi acheh
a nice place to stay
a nice place to stay
Will stay here again
Just ok to rest your body

reviews.reviewNegatives: Tuvimos que pagar por el papel del wc, pero es anecdótico, por poner algo, todo estuvo perfecto.

reviews.reviewTitle: Correcto para una noche de paso
reviews.reviewPositives: Es un hotel correcto para hacer una noche de camino a Pulau Weh. POr el precio que pagas está bien. Limpio y sin lujos. Correcto.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Ok por el precio. Hotel sencillo para una noche de paso.

reviews.reviewComments: Ok for one night stay

reviews.reviewPositives: La ubicación es a 15 minutos andando de la Mezquita de Banda Aceh. Es un hotel correcto para pasar una noche, a la ida o regreso de  Pulau Weh.  La habitación estaba en la parte de atrás del hotel pasando un estacionamiento. estaba limpia y con aire acondicionado. La Cama es grande y comoda
reviews.reviewNegatives: El baño no tenía lavatorio, me lave los dientes en la ducha. Tampoco había papel higiénico ni cesto de basura. En el pasillo había trastos y un poco de desorden. Pero fue solo una noche.

reviews.reviewComments: sangat sangat recomended pokoknya. the best kali

reviews.reviewPositives:
Hotel sencillo pero con todo lo necesario. Muy limpio y cama cómoda. Con aire acondicionado y agua caliente.
 Comparado con otros hoteles baratos de la zona es excepcional. De hecho, a la vuelta, reservé otro hotel más caro y tuve que salir de allí por la suciedad. Así que repetí en el oyó y fue estupendo.

reviews.reviewComments: Had terrible experience here, cannot sleep and had very bad itchiness at my back

reviews.reviewTitle: Servicio de ayuda al cliente inmejorable!
reviews.reviewPositives: Tienen una persona con moto (Dani) que te ayuda en todo lo que necesitas de un modo magnífico. Es sin duda lo mejor del hotel, que es modesto, pero con una buena relación calidad precio. El servicio de Dani, sin embargo, es propio de un hotel de cinco estrellas! Enhorabuena.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Las ventanas sin cristales del cuarto de baño

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel that complete your basic needs
reviews.reviewComments: They have hot shower and good working air conditioning. No drinking water provided in the room but you  can always use the water dispenser outside the room area. There was a weird sound when you move on the bed, probably because it was an old bed. The room was clean and nice. Cheap and provide the basic needs. No lift provided so you have to take the stairs if your room is upstairs.
Good stay with fair price. Rooms clean, decent size with good air conditioning.

reviews.reviewPositives: 除了住的靠近街边，有点吵以外，其他我觉得都很优秀！干净，整洁，无异味，这很难得！老板和店员都很热心

reviews.reviewPositives: 交通便利，干净温馨，服务周到！

reviews.reviewComments: The hotel location is near to mosque. Walking distance to nearest bus stop where you can ride freely. The hotel facility is acceptable. But the wall between the room is not sound proof. So its a bit annoying when you can listen others talking and doing in the adjacent room. Sometime a bit noisy from walkway. This situation possibly interrupt your stay. No breakfast provided.
Location is great, walking distance to the souvenir street shop. the room is nice, value for money
Waking distance to food stalls,

reviews.reviewTitle: Everything was okay. Can be improved somemore.
reviews.reviewComments: The room was cheap, near with shop. Easy to book grab. The room definitely not a sound proof. You can hear the staf talking very loud. But if you bear, it's okay.

Staying here for one night before going to Pulau Weh.
Affordable,clean. the only main challenge is too many stairs, better to leave luggage in ground floor.
Highly recommended. Value for money with good cleanliness.

there are food stall nearby
a little bit far from tourist attraction but for me still walking distance
staff friendly
wifi good

We enjoy our 4 days 3 nights stay at Maulana.
3 Minutes walking distance to Green Mosque and 1 KM to Baitul Rahman Mosque.
Next door is a small grocery store if you need to buy any goods
Good staff, room unproffing sound because you can hear people from next room chit chat..
The staff is friendly and helpful. The room is clean and comfortable. Everything is satisfying. :)
Good location. Lovely rooms, very clean, well equipped, with AC. Helpful staff. Recommended.
Tempat bagus, warm and cozy

Great location to the mosque
Hotel is quiet and comfortable with free provision of shower gel and towels
Limited parking space. Should be more flexible for chek in and out time . 14:00 till 12:00 (the day after) is to tight.
Lokasi strategic.

Really nice room, own bathroom. Helpful staff, easy to access all you need. 
Recommended.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lokalizacja w centrum, łatwo się było dostać pieszo do głównych atrakcji. Bardzo czysto (łazienka, pokój, biała pościel).Bardzo atrakcyjna cena. Miła usługa. Hotel był perełką, jak na standardy indonezyjskie. Na korytarzu był czajnik i kubki dostępne dla turystów. Cicha lokalizacja. Wokół dużo punktów z jedzeniem i sokami
reviews.reviewNegatives: Można pomyśleć, o zakazie palenia na korytarzu, co jest chyba niemożliwe w Indonezji, gdzie chyba większość mężczyzn pali.

reviews.reviewComments: Good

reviews.reviewNegatives: Too noisy at all hours of the day, it smells bad because smoking is allowed everywhere, misleading advertising by including breakfast in the price paid when it wasn't provided.

reviews.reviewComments: Kamarnya bnyak nyamuk..tp overall lumayan laa dgn hrga segitu.

nice and clean rooms,
very good located surrounded by restaurants, supermarket and near the river.

reviews.reviewComments: The room was very clean and all facilities working. It had hot water and staff was very nice.

reviews.reviewPositives: The rooms are large and clean, and I slept very well there. For the reasonable price, there is nothing to complain about. I would come back anytime.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The staff hardly speak any English and were not very helpful regarding my onward journey by bus.

reviews.reviewTitle: Thank you Alvin and Eka for this lovely stay. See you soon !

reviews.reviewComments: Location near the city.. Clean and comfortable place.. Suitable for a small budget...

reviews.reviewPositives: We stayed here at short notice as flight to medan was cancelled. Had all facilities you needed plus it was quiet - a surprise in central Banda aceh
reviews.reviewNegatives: No toilet paper initially - had to ask.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis dan bersih sih
reviews.reviewComments: The location is strategic and clean.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel bersih dan sesuai dengan harga

The location is nice since it’s near to city where you can have local food & coffee. It also in front of convenience store, indomaret. So I totally love it and not scared at all !!

reviews.originalComment: Selalu nginap disini tiap ke banda. Kamarnya luas, hotel paling bersih dg harga yg worth it
reviews.reviewComments: Always stay here every time I go to Banda. The room is spacious, the cleanest hotel with a price that is worth it.

reviews.originalComment: Sukaaa banget sama hotel ini. Harganya sangat worth it dan terletak di tengah kota. Yang paling saya suka hotelnya sangat bersihh, bakalan nginap terus di sini kalau ke banda aceh. Selain itu banyak penjual makanan di sekitaran hotel
reviews.reviewComments: I really love this hotel. The price is very worth it and it is located in the city center. What I like the most is that the hotel is very clean, I will keep staying here whenever I go to Banda Aceh. Additionally, there are many food vendors around the hotel.

reviews.reviewComments: Stayed for the second time, still the best and the cleanest.

reviews.reviewComments: For tourists to be more comfortable.
My room was very clean, great AC, and a good location for a good price. I would stay here again.

reviews.originalComment: Tv chanel nya banyak ditutup ,chanel untuk anak 2 nggak ada..sehingga harus nonton dihp ,anak saya kurang saya kasih hp,
reviews.reviewComments: Many TV channels have been closed, and there are no channels for children, so they have to watch on their phones; I don't give my child a phone too often.

reviews.reviewComments: Overall, it was really good and highly recommended for the accommodation, but the only downside was the lack of breakfast in the morning.

reviews.originalComment: Masyaallah sekali nginap disini, harga terjangkau tapi kurangnya tidak dapat sarapan, dan setau saya setiap menginap di hotel itu ada sarapannya, mungkin kedepannya diperbaiki lagi
reviews.reviewComments: Mashallah, staying here is great, the price is affordable but the downside is that there is no breakfast provided, and as far as I know, there is breakfast included in every hotel stay. Maybe it can be improved in the future.

reviews.reviewTitle: I am very satisfied with this hotel.
reviews.originalTitle: saya sangat puas dengan hotel ni
reviews.originalComment: perfect cocok sangat buat yang perlu hotel dekat kota dekat dengan kuliner juga dan dekat dengan masjid raya
reviews.reviewComments: Perfect, very suitable for those who need a hotel close to the city, near dining options, and close to the grand mosque.

Value for money? Of course. But there is no some items which other same rate hotel provide them, such as no closet, no sajadah available in room, no soap at all in my room at that time. The room vibe was good, clean and tidy.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice place in the city center
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean , bathroom also clean . A good place to stay
Awesome hotel to stay as it is super value for money. Always stay here each time we visit Banda Aceh with tons on convenience around like shops, food etc
We always stay in this hotel everything we visit Banda Aceh. Well located with plenty of facilities around like shops, food court etc.

A simple hotel for 1 night stay with great value of money. The room is clean and the air-con is working fine.
The pillow is too thin for me and there is no extra pillow available after checking with reception.
Other than that the hotel is located in a great location, food stall and Indomaret is just right beside the hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Sudah coba semua hotel yang harga di atas hotel ini.. Mulana yang paling bersih dan nyaman.
reviews.reviewComments: I have tried all the hotels that are more expensive than this one. Mulana is the cleanest and most comfortable.

Have always been staying in this hotel every time I travel to Banda Aceh. Very value for money, so can't expect much of facilities but surrounding is very convenient with plenty of food and amenities. Is just that the hotel didn't upkeep its air conditioning and hot shower in which I feel a very important thing to do so. Hope the hotel takes note of this and make some improvement of this area

Have always been staying in this hotel every time I travel to Banda Aceh. Very value for money, so can't expect much of facilities but surrounding is very convenient with plenty of food and amenities. Is just that the hotel didn't upkeep its air conditioning and hot shower in which I feel a very important thing to do so. Hope the hotel takes note of this and make some improvement of this area

Have always been staying in this hotel every time I travel to Banda Aceh. Very value for money, so can't expect much of facilities but surrounding is very convenient with plenty of food and amenities. Is just that the hotel didn't upkeep its air conditioning and hot shower in which I feel a very important thing to do so. Hope the hotel takes note of this and make some improvement of this area

reviews.originalComment: Tempat yang sangat nyaman untuk menginap individu maupun keluarga. Sangat dekat dengan segala akses yang ada di kota banda aceh. Sangat puas dengan penginapannya..
reviews.reviewComments: A very comfortable place to stay for individuals as well as families. Very close to all the access points in the city of Banda Aceh. Very satisfied with the accommodation.

Service was a 5/10. Requested for an extra pillow but did not receive. Stated that it was a room with a double bed but received a room with 2 single beds.  The room was different in reality as it had a different setting. The toilet was okay. The hall/ lobby was messy and again looked nothing like in the picture. The aircond wasnt fully functioning at first and the electric was also switched off by the staff when we were out for a bit. We had to figure it out and switched it back on ourselves. would suggest to stay here if you were to look for a place to just sleep for the night.

reviews.originalComment: Tertipu sampul. Awal nya sekilas saya melihat hotel ini dr luar biasa aja. Tadinya saya menginap di hotel lain yg lebih besar dengan harga yang sama, tapi sya cancel karena pihak hotel lain itu minta tmbahan skitar 58rb yg tdak sesuai dgan aplikasi. Akhirnya saya pindah ke hotel ini. Dan setalah saya check in hanya bayar sesuai aplikasi. Dan keren nya lagi, ternyata hotel ini bahkan lebih bersih dr hotel yg saya tolak sebelumnya. Kamar bersih banget, handuk, seprai smuanya bersih. Ac dingin, wlopun agak lama, air panas ckup ok. Air mnum tdak di sediakan, tp di lorong kamar ada air isi ulang/aqua dan gelas. Wifi kencang. Utk anda yg mau mnginap di caisar mending anda ke hotel ini. Saya jamin lebih puas. Mau makan dan beli ini itu juga dpan hotel tersedia, ada indomart dan kios di sekitaran hotel. Pelayanan juga bagus.
reviews.reviewComments: Deceived by the cover. At first glance, I thought this hotel looked just okay from the outside. I was originally staying at a bigger hotel for the same price, but I canceled because that hotel asked for an additional fee of about 58,000 that did not match the application. In the end, I moved to this hotel. After checking in, I only paid what was indicated in the application. And the amazing thing is, this hotel is even cleaner than the hotel I rejected earlier. The room is very clean, towels, sheets, everything is clean. The air conditioner is cold, although it takes a bit of time, and the hot water is quite okay. Drinking water is not provided, but there is refillable water/aqua and cups in the hallway. The Wi-Fi is fast. For those of you who want to stay in Caisar, it's better to choose this hotel. I guarantee you will be more satisfied. You can also find food and buy various things in front of the hotel, with an Indomart and stalls around the hotel. The service is also good.

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya bagus, dapat handuk 2, ada lemari kecil,meja dan kursi di kamar, ada tv. ada sabun mandi (tidak tersedia odol dan sikat gigi), kamar bersih, kamar mandi bersih, parkiran nya bisa di depan dan jga bisa di belakang. Lokasi dekat dengan jembatan Peunayong. Pas check in ada uang cas kamar Rp100.000,-
reviews.reviewComments: The room is nice, has 2 towels, a small wardrobe, a table and chair in the room, and a TV. There is shower soap (toothpaste and toothbrush are not provided), the room is clean, the bathroom is clean, parking can be in the front or in the back. The location is close to the Peunayong bridge. Upon check-in, there is a cash deposit for the room of Rp100,000.
Have stayed in this hotel few times. Staff are all friendly. Basic facilities like free wifi & hot shower. Convenient as there are plenty of food available around. Great stay 👍🏽👍🏽

A simple yet very clean hotel. Basic facilities like free wifi, hot shower. Staff are all friendly as well, I have stayed here for few times now. Will continue to stay here whenever I go to Banda Aceh

Muy bien ubicado. Nos gustó mucho pues veníamos de pasar una noche malísima en otro hotel de Banda Aceh que apestaba (huir de habitaciones sin ventana exterior). Buena relación calidad precio. Repetiría
Tout est bien! Pour le tarif wow! À la réception le personnel est agréable et aidant.

reviews.reviewTitle: Chambre confortable pour une nuit à Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Très bon rapport qualité-prix pour cet hotel, dont nous avons apprécié l'accueil,  le confort et la propreté. Il y a des commerces et des restaurants à proximité.
Pulito, vicino alla moschea, comodo.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good budget option in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Mulana is clean, with hot water (a rarity in Sumatra) and comfortable beds. It's centrally located (20 minutes walk to the tsunami Museum and Kapal PLTD Apung) and surrounded by laundry shops and plenty of food options. The food court nearby (exit, turn right and walk until the first junction) is cheap and good - I loved the ayam penyet and the fresh durian. Will definitely stay again the next time I am in Aceh.

reviews.reviewTitle: You get what you pay for
reviews.reviewComments: Prima budgethotel voor 1 of 2 nachtjes. Zoals de titel zegt, you get what you pay for. Bed was vrij hard. Spiegels, deuren en hoofdbord van het bed had zeker schoner gekund. Overal hangen flyers dat roken zogenaamd verboden is in het hotel, maar op de eerste verdieping wordt volop gerookt in een openbare ruimte. Smerig vonden wij.
bersih

Kasur Keras Banget Seperti Papan, dan kamar yang di kasih tidak sesuai dengan yang di Gambar/Foto. Mau minta ganti kamar alasannya kamar penuh terus di bilang namanya juga kamar murah ya seperti itu adanya, jawabannya seperti tidak bertanggung jawab, padahal jelas jelas kamar yang di kasih tidak sesuai dengan foto. Staf nya sangat tidak sopan dalam melayani tamu, sombong dan tidak ramah. Cukup sekali saya ke sana, 1 jam di sana langsung saya checkout.  Saya merasa tidak ada kenyamanan untuk berlama lama di hotel itu.
Fasilitas dengan harga sesuai

reviews.reviewTitle: Kamar Luas, Terbaik untuk harga yang sangat murah
reviews.reviewComments: Membayar minimal mendapatkan maksimal.
Mantap

reviews.reviewTitle: Budget friendly lodge in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Dapat harga lumayan murah, tempatnya dekat halte kutaraja juga. Jadi mudah ke mana2. Dekat tempat2 makan. Fasilitas OK. Kamar lumayan luas dan ada AC.
Serangga masuk kedalam bilik memalui ruang udara di dalam bilik air untuk bilik dilantai bawah. 101, 111 dan 110.
Heharusnya diletak jaring pada ruang udara bilik air. Serangga masuk memalui ruang ini..Harap pihak pegurusan hotel ambil tindakkan segera untuk keselesaan penghuni hotel

Hotel nya bersih dan nyaman, hanya saja staff nya staff terburuk yg pernah saya temuin...
Ngomong ketus, tidak ada senyum nya, sy minta pindah kamar dr lantai 2 ke lantai 1 jika ada kamar kosong diladenin dgn ketus...
Udah gitu pas nge cek kamar waktu checkout, kita diperlakukan seperti pencuri handuk, padahal staff nya nge cek kamar nya gak beres masa anduk dibawah seprei aja gak kelihatan, sudah gitu ngomong nya ke kita seakan2 kita ambil handuk nya...🤬

Untung aja gak kita gampar tu staff nya...
Pokok nya kalau mau nginap disini gak usah banyak ngomong, cukup interaksi sm staff nya pas checkin dan checkout, gak usah ngomong selebih nya ata request apapun, supanya gak naik darah...
Tidak sesuai dgm expektasi
Staff nya tidak ramah. Pelayanan kurang! Entah karna kami pendatang gatau juga
Biasa aja... Ga ada yg istimewa...

reviews.reviewTitle: Tempat nyaman, dan bersih sedangkan hrg murah
reviews.reviewComments: Recommended banget
Bagus untuk backpacker
Utk knymnan hotel bgus dan plynan memuaskn

Setelah menginap 8 hari di ini menurut saya, Hotel ini nyaman dan bersih, rekondasi untuk yang backpacker, solo atau duo traveling, tempat yang nyaman untuk istirahat setelah berkeliling kota Banda Aceh. Staf dan pemilik yang ramah  ( pemilik tinggal dihotel ini juga).
Gampang untuk cari makan malam, jarak ke Masjid Raya lumayan sekitar 1km, bisa di tempuh dengan jalan kaki.(masjid sekitar hoter juga ada 100m) dekat dari tempat membeli oleh oleh.

Kekurangan :
Tidak ada sarapan pagi (beli di sekitae hotel banyak).
Siaran TV kabel tidak ada.


Saran, untuk nginap disini sebaiknya booking lewat Aplikasi karena lebih murah.

uda 2x nginep di Mulana sini. karna pertama kalinya kesini uda cocok banget. meski harganya murah tapi bagus kebersihannya.kamarnya pun nyaman. lengkap ada shower,tv,ac,meja,wastafel,wifi. lokasi strategis deket dgn tmpt wisata kok. dan disediakan air gratis, ada dispenser juga untuk isi ulang air. diluar kamar juga sangat rapi dilengkapi ruang makan untuk tamu hotel. pokoknya mau lagi nginep disini lain kali kalo ke aceh👌

Tilam agak keras seperti tidur atas papan

kesemua baik dan bagus..bersih dan sangat selesa..senang untuk mencari makan..durian pun ada berdekatan..amik gojet pun mudah..
cuma..keperluan mandi seperti tuala dan toiletries tidak ditukar/ditambah setiap hari..hanya bilik sahaja dikemas..overall very good..tq Maulana Hotel..
Pelayanan baik dan ramah. Kamar cukup oke terutama mengingat harga yg ditawarkan. Parkiran belakang luas dan ada atapnya, mantap.
Semua Parameter Bagus dan Memuaskan, Namun Sikap Staff yg kaku dan Mengharuskan anak usia 9 tahun sewa extra Bed .........
